description_long: This is a sporty blue coupe car with a sleek, aerodynamic body and a low stance, characteristic of high-performance vehicles. The front features a distinctive kidney grille, aggressive headlights, and a vented hood, while the rear displays dual exhausts and a subtle trunk lip spoiler. The car has two doors, frameless side windows, and alloy wheels with a multi-spoke design. The side profile reveals sculpted lines and a slightly flared rear fender, enhancing its dynamic appearance. The windows are tinted, and the car is equipped with side mirrors and detailed trim. The license plates and manufacturer badging are visible on both the front and rear, indicating a premium European brand.
description: A blue, sporty two-door coupe with a sleek, aerodynamic design, alloy wheels, and distinctive front and rear styling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the kidney grille, aggressive headlights, vented hood, and front license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door coupe profile, alloy wheels, and sculpted body lines.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dual exhausts, rear lights, trunk lip spoiler, and rear license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe silhouette, alloy wheels, and side trim.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
